top_signals.title: BP held talks about selling £2bn of UK North Sea assets to Ithaca
top_signals.summary: Oil major still exploring a deal despite failed discussions as CEO Meg O’Neill pursues restructuring
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Seven states sue US for paying $1bn to make Total exit wind power
top_signals.summary: New York leads lawsuit challenging Trump administration’s effort to make French company reinvest in fossil fuels

top_signals.title: Spain arrests suspected hacker for publishing personal data of police, prosecutors and cyber officials
top_signals.summary: Police described the incident as a large-scale disclosure of sensitive personal information that posed a threat to both the affected individuals and the institutions they serve. The data was allegedly posted on multiple internet platforms.
